description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds successfully as baseline
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/mind-map to install all dependencies
Run `npm run build` to verify the project compiles without errors
Confirm the build output (dist/ directory) is created successfully
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` completes without errors and produces a dist/ directory
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/mind-map && npm install && npm run build
findings: npm install completed with 182 packages, 0 vulnerabilities. Build succeeded in 1.79s producing dist/ with index.html, CSS, and JS bundle. Node.js v22 used.
